author: doll-agent
content: Implemented mod_(arr, args) in ferray-strings::extras — printf-style %-formatting. args is a slice of &str consumed in conversion order. Supported specifiers: %s, %% (literal), %d/%i (integer), %f / %.Nf (float, default 6-decimal), %e (scientific), %g (shortest of fixed/scientific). Width/flag specifiers beyond %.N are intentionally not supported (parsing the full printf grammar inside a ufunc isn't worth the complexity; users reach for f-strings instead). Errors on too-few args, unknown specifier, or argument-parse failure. 4 unit tests cover %s, %d/%f combo, %% literal, and missing-args path.
